next_step.current_state: All eight finance records updated with schema-shaped frontmatter while preserving bodies. Per inbox-processing workflow, now delete completed inbox item.
Task completed successfully: processed next inbox item, updated 8 finance records with YAML frontmatter per finance schema, and deleted the inbox item.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the requested eight finance notes through the OCR-to-frontmatter workflow. Added schema-shaped YAML frontmatter to four invoice records and four bill records while preserving each original note body, then removed the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and 99_system inspection requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before working in finance subfolders, used OCR/migration workflows plus the finance schema, preserved original note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request listed eight specific finance notes to OCR. Each of the eight source notes visibly contained all schema-required fields and line items, allowing exact extraction into YAML frontmatter under the finance schema. The workflow docs direct adding frontmatter to existing notes, preserving note bodies, and deleting the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance completion.
